expected_reason_codes.non_runtime_notice: These codes are comparison-harness diagnostics only and must not be loaded by runtime selector code.

source_grounding.source_corpus: synthetic RelayOps incident-card corpus supplied in blind authoring package
source_grounding.grounding_note: Only the supplied card IDs and their schema-derived signatures ground this evaluation asset.

acceptance_reason: INC-009 is strictly stronger on identity, change-context, and supported signal evidence even though the lower incident identifier is listed first.
diagnostic_explanation: This is not a generic exact-match case: it places INC-010, the lower identifier and first listed candidate, against a candidate that is mechanically superior on every permitted typed dimension.

order_reversal_invariant.comparison_rule: Only candidate serialization order differs; the evaluated selection outcome must be identical.
